DEPT 1/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. ATNY T. WRIGHT PRESENT FOR PLTF. DEFT DAVE WEINER PRESENT IN PRO-PER. CASE SETTLED, TERMS NOT ON RECIRD. PLTF SUBMITTED STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT SIGNED BY PARTIES.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEINER, DAVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 161 POWELL STREET #505, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL APR-30-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, BACK RENT/DMGS WAIVED BY PLTF. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & FEES. MUTUTAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. IF DFT VACATES TIMELY, PLTF WILL VACATE JUDGMNT & DISMISS; DOCUMENTS TO BE PRE- PARED BY PLTF WITHIN 30DYS.
